title: Preview Creative Request
description: Request to generate previews of creative manifests. Uses request_type to select single, batch, or variant mode.

adcp_major_version.description: The AdCP major version the buyer's payloads conform to. Sellers validate against their supported major_versions and return VERSION_UNSUPPORTED if unsupported. When omitted, the seller assumes its highest supported version.

request_type.description: Preview mode. 'single' previews one creative manifest. 'batch' previews multiple creatives in one call. 'variant' replays a post-flight variant by ID.

creative_manifest.description: Complete creative manifest with all required assets for the format. Required when request_type is 'single'. Also accepted per item in batch mode.

format_id.description: Format identifier for rendering the preview. Defaults to creative_manifest.format_id if omitted. Used in single mode.

inputs.description: Array of input sets for generating multiple preview variants. Each input set defines macros and context values for one preview rendering. Used in single mode.

name.description: Human-readable name for this input set (e.g., 'Sunny morning on mobile', 'Evening podcast ad', 'Desktop dark mode')

macros.description: Macro values to use for this preview. Supports all universal macros from the format's supported_macros list.

context_description.description: Natural language description of the context for AI-generated content (e.g., 'User just searched for running shoes', 'Podcast discussing weather patterns')

template_id.description: Specific template ID for custom format rendering. Used in single mode.

quality.description: Render quality. 'draft' produces fast, lower-fidelity renderings. 'production' produces full-quality renderings. In batch mode, sets the default for all requests (individual items can override).

output_format.description: Output format. 'url' returns preview_url (iframe-embeddable URL), 'html' returns preview_html (raw HTML). In batch mode, sets the default for all requests (individual items can override). Default: 'url'.

item_limit.description: Maximum number of catalog items to render per preview variant. Used in single mode. Creative agents SHOULD default to a reasonable sample when omitted and the catalog is large.

requests.description: Array of preview requests (1-50 items). Required when request_type is 'batch'. Each item follows the single request structure.

format_id.description: Format identifier for rendering the preview. Defaults to creative_manifest.format_id if omitted.

creative_manifest.description: Complete creative manifest with all required assets.

inputs.description: Array of input sets for generating multiple preview variants

name.description: Human-readable name for this input set

macros.description: Macro values to use for this preview

context_description.description: Natural language description of the context for AI-generated content

template_id.description: Specific template ID for custom format rendering

quality.description: Render quality for this preview. Overrides batch-level default.

output_format.description: Output format for this preview. Overrides batch-level default.

item_limit.description: Maximum number of catalog items to render in this preview.

variant_id.description: Platform-assigned variant identifier from get_creative_delivery response. Required when request_type is 'variant'.

creative_id.description: Creative identifier for context. Used in variant mode.
